specific_rules_name: Self-Service Exchange Kiosk Specific Case Rules

first_check_steps: Check if the banknote is a currently accepted currency and denomination.
Straighten any folds or creases in the note.
Insert the note in the correct orientation as shown on screen.
Insert only one note at a time — do not insert multiple notes together.
If the machine returns the note, do not force it in. Remove it and try again.
cases.escalate_message: If the note is still not accepted after these checks, please contact support.

cases.display_name: Received amount seems lower than expected
explanation: The exchange rate applied is based on the representative bank-posted rate at the time of your transaction.
Amounts below KRW 1,000 are rounded down and not included in the final payout.
The final amount shown on screen before confirmation reflects the actual amount you will receive.
cases.clarification_note: If you believe there is a specific error in your transaction amount, please contact support.

cases.answer: The exchange rate used is based on the representative bank-posted rate for this service. The rate is updated periodically during business hours. You can see the rate applied to your transaction on the kiosk screen before you confirm.

first_check_steps: Open the passport to the photo and personal information page.
Place the passport flat and fully on the scanner window.
Avoid light reflection or shadows on the page.
Keep the passport still while the scan is in progress.
If the page is bent, gently flatten it before scanning.
Try removing the passport and reinserting it if the first attempt fails.
cases.escalate_message: If the scan still does not work after multiple attempts, please contact support.

cases.display_name: Screen is frozen or not progressing
first_check_steps: Check what step is currently shown on the screen.
Wait a few moments — the screen may still be processing.
Do not insert cash or press multiple buttons while waiting.
If the screen remains frozen for more than 1–2 minutes, contact support.
cases.escalate_message: Please contact support if the screen does not respond. Do not attempt to restart the machine yourself.

cases.display_name: Money was inserted but not reflected
cases.message: This requires support review. Please do not insert more cash or restart the machine. Contact support immediately with your location, time of use, currency, and amount.
Refund requests must be handled by our support team. Please contact support with your transaction details.
